creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: antoine
Date: Fri Jan 17 17:22:50 2014
New Revision: 340084
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/340084
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r340084/

Log:
  Handle _FORCE_POST_PATTERNS for staged ports
  
  PR:		ports/185369
  Reviewed by:	bapt
  With hat:	portmgr

Modified:
  head/Mk/bsd.pkgng.mk

Modified: head/Mk/bsd.pkgng.mk
==============================================================================
--- head/Mk/bsd.pkgng.mk	Fri Jan 17 17:10:01 2014	(r340083)
+++ head/Mk/bsd.pkgng.mk	Fri Jan 17 17:22:50 2014	(r340084)
@@ -246,7 +246,7 @@ do-package: ${TMPPLIST}
 	@for cat in ${CATEGORIES}; do \
 		${RM} -f ${PACKAGES}/$$cat/${PKGNAMEPREFIX}${PORTNAME}*${PKG_SUFX} ; \
 	done
-	@if ${PKG_CREATE} ${PKG_CREATE_ARGS} -o ${PKGREPOSITORY} ${PKGNAME}; then \
+	@if ${SETENV} FORCE_POST="${_FORCE_POST_PATTERNS}" ${PKG_CREATE} ${PKG_CREATE_ARGS} -o ${PKGREPOSITORY} ${PKGNAME}; then \
 		if [ -n "${WITH_PKGNG}" ]; then \
 			if [ "${PKGORIGIN}" = "ports-mgmt/pkg" -o "${PKGORIGIN}" = "ports-mgmt/pkg-devel" ]; then \
 				if [ ! -d ${PKGLATESTREPOSITORY} ]; then \
